title: District Court Rayagada Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Junior Typist, Steno and More Posts
post_name: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist & Stenographer Grade-III
short_info: District Court Rayagada has officially announced the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist & Stenographer Grade-III Recruitment 2026 with 17 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. 01/2026 at the official website of District Court Rayagada. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 42 years and hold qualifications such as Graduate degree, Diploma in Computer Application, and required Typing/Shorthand speed can submit their offline applications up to 17 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/SEBC/Women: 5 years PWD/Ex-serviceman: As per rules

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Diploma in Computer Application, Typing/Shorthand speed
qualification.details: For Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist and Stenographer Grade III: Citizen of India +3 examination or equivalent Diploma in Computer Application Ability to speak, read and write Odia and passed a test in Odia equivalent to M.E. standard Good character Sound health, good physique and free from organic defects or bodily infirmity Not more than one spouse living, if married For Junior Typist: Minimum speed of 40 words in type writing per minute For Stenographer Grade III: Minimum speed of 80 words in short hand and 40 words in type writing per minute

salary_details.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- (Level 4) Junior Typist: Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- (Level 4) Stenographer Grade-III: Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level 7)

selection_process: Written competitive examination Computer test Viva-voce test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Rayagada Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://rayagada.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
